subtitle: How a City of Brick and Dust Gathered Around a Quiet Pool

panels.shot: epic low-angle wide of the citadel mound with the Great Bath at center
panels.action: The Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer stands at the edge of a vast brick-lined tank on the citadel mound, the gridded city stretching into the hazy Indus plain below.

dialogue.text: On the high mound of Mohenjo-daro, unknown hands shaped a brick pool that drew a whole city to its still water.

i18n.hi: मोहनजोदड़ो की ऊँची टीले पर अनजान हाथों ने ऐसा ईंट का कुण्ड बनाया, जिसने पूरे शहर को अपने ठहरे पानी की ओर खींच लिया।

panels.shot: bird's-eye wide over the Indus plain at sunrise
panels.action: Mist curls over the wide Indus river as the rising sun reveals scattered fields, canals, and the compact mass of Mohenjo-daro rising from the plain.

dialogue.text: Around 2500 BCE, the Indus plain woke each day to river-mist and baked earth, where farmers, traders and craftsmen together built dense brick cities on high ground.

i18n.hi: करीब 2500 ईसा पूर्व, सिंधु मैदान हर दिन नदी की धुंध और तपती मिट्टी में जागता, जहाँ किसान, व्यापारी और कारीगर मिलकर ऊँचे टीले पर सघन ईंटों के शहर खड़े करते।

panels.shot: sweeping three-quarter aerial of the citadel and lower city
panels.action: From above, the stepped citadel mound with massive brick platforms dominates the ordered streets and houses of the lower city below; the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer surveys it from the edge.

dialogue.text: Mohenjo-daro rose in careful lines, streets meeting at right angles, drains hidden beneath, and on its citadel mound, heavy brick platforms waited for buildings of special weight and meaning.

i18n.hi: मोहनजोदड़ो सीधी रेखाओं में उठा, गलियाँ समकोण पर मिलतीं, नालियाँ नीचे छिपी, और दुर्ग–टीले पर भारी ईंट–मंच खास इमारतों के बोझ और अर्थ को थामे इंतज़ार करते।

panels.shot: medium close-up of the engineer kneeling by bricks
panels.action: The Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer kneels, holding a standard baked brick, measuring it against a row of neatly stacked identical bricks beside a shallow trench.

dialogue.text: The city’s builders were not named in seals or tablets, yet their bricks speak: same ratio, same measure, baked hard, laid in straight lines from house wall to citadel platform.

i18n.hi: शहर बनाने वालों के नाम मुहरों या पट्टों पर नहीं, पर उनकी ईंटें बोलती हैं: वही अनुपात, वही नाप, सख़्त पकाई, घर की दीवार से किले के मंच तक सीधी कतारों में जड़ी।

panels.shot: wide shot from inside a deep rectangular excavation
panels.action: From within a large rectangular pit cut into the citadel platform, the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer directs workers above as they lower baskets of broken brick and compacted clay.

dialogue.text: On the mound’s western side, they cut down into earlier brickwork, filling and leveling, making a sunken rectangle where earth had once been solid.

i18n.hi: टीले के पश्चिम ढाल पर उन्होंने पुरानी ईंटों को काटा, भराई कर समतल किया, वहाँ धँचा हुआ चबूतरा बनाया जहाँ पहले ठोस धरती थी।

panels.shot: low-angle wide showing rising brick walls of the tank
panels.action: The walls of the rectangular tank rise course by course, perfectly aligned bricks forming a hollow 12 by 7 metre basin under the watchful gaze of the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer.

dialogue.text: Brick after brick, a hollow took shape: about twelve cubits by seven, more than two men deep, sunk inside the massive citadel platform.

i18n.hi: ईंट पर ईंट रखकर उन्होंने एक गहरा गढ़ा गढ़ा: करीब बारह हाथ लंबा, सात हाथ चौड़ा, दो आदमियों से भी ज़्यादा गहरा, दुर्ग के भारी मंच के भीतर धँसा हुआ।

panels.shot: close-up of hands mixing gypsum mortar
panels.action: The Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer’s hands grind white gypsum powder with water into a smooth paste, while nearby a worker points to the inner brick joints of the tank.

dialogue.text: Ordinary mud would not do. They ground pale gypsum, mixing it to a tight mortar, pressing it between inner bricks so water would slide and not seep away.

i18n.hi: साधारण मिट्टी का मसाला नाकाफ़ी था। उन्होंने फीका जिप्सम पीसा, उसे कसा गारा बनाया, भीतर की ईंटों के बीच दबाया ताकि पानी फिसले, रिसकर भाग न जाए।

panels.shot: medium shot at tank floor level
panels.action: Standing at the floor of the empty tank, the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer oversees workers as they smear dark bitumen along seams where floor meets wall.

dialogue.text: Along the floor and lower walls, they spread black bitumen from distant sources, a sticky skin over the brick and gypsum, a barrier between water and the thirsty mound beneath.

i18n.hi: फ़र्श और निचली दीवारों पर उन्होंने दूर–दराज़ से आया काला राल पोता, ईंट और जिप्सम पर चिपचिपी परत, पानी और प्यासे टीले के बीच की मज़बूत ढाल।

panels.shot: angled top-down view highlighting inlet and steps
panels.action: From above, the stepped sides of the tank descend in brick tiers, while at one short end a narrow inlet channel pierces the wall, flanked by the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer inspecting it.

dialogue.text: They built wide stairs on two sides for many feet to climb, and at one end a tight inlet channel, so water could be led in, controlled, and cut off when needed.

i18n.hi: दो ओर उन्होंने चौड़ी सीढ़ियाँ बनाईं, अनगिनत पाँवों के आने–जाने को, और एक सिरे पर तंग नाली, जिससे पानी लाया जा सके, रोका–छोड़ा जा सके जब चाहें।

panels.shot: cutaway-style wide of bath with surrounding rooms
panels.action: A sectional view reveals the finished tank at center, encircled by small brick rooms and passages on the citadel, while the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer stands in one doorway, contemplating the complex.

dialogue.text: Around the tank rose a ring of rooms and corridors, opening onto the water yet sheltered from the city below, as if this hollow was meant for gatherings set apart from daily trade.

i18n.hi: हौद के चारों तरफ़ कमरे और गलियारे उठे, जो पानी की ओर खुलते पर नीचे शहर से ढके रहते, जैसे यह गहराई रोज़मर्रा के बाज़ार से अलग, खास बैठकों के लिए बनी हो।

panels.shot: medium shot of engineer touching surrounding room wall
panels.action: In a dim room bordering the tank, the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer runs his hand along the brick wall, through a doorway that frames the gleam of the empty basin beyond.

dialogue.speaker: mohenjo_daro_engineers
dialogue.text: Not for cattle, not for grain. This water will be for people together.

i18n.hi: न मवेशी के लिए, न अनाज के लिए। यह पानी इंसानों के साथ–साथ रहने के लिए होगा।

panels.shot: wide shot of workers channeling water toward the citadel
panels.action: Lines of workers direct water along a shallow brick-lined channel up the mound using jars and sluice boards, the distant tank awaiting its first filling.

dialogue.text: They coaxed water uphill from a nearby source, through channels and jars, trusting in gradient and sealant, watching to see if the citadel would drink or hold.

i18n.hi: उन्होंने पास के स्त्रोत से पानी को ऊँचाई पर चढ़ाया, नालियों और घड़ों के सहारे, ढाल और गारे पर भरोसा रखकर, देखते रहे कि दुर्ग पानी पीता है या सँभालकर रखता है।

panels.shot: dramatic low-angle from inside the tank looking up
panels.action: From the floor of the tank, we see the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer look up as water begins to pour in through the inlet, splashing against the bitumen-darkened walls.

dialogue.text: The first flow came in a narrow sheet, striking the blackened brick. For long moments they watched for damp patches, for trickles beneath. The walls stayed dry.

i18n.hi: पहली धार एक पतली चादर बनकर उतरी, काले पड़े ईंटों से टकराई। देर तक वे नमी के धब्बे, नीचे बहती लकीरों को ताकते रहे। दीवारें सूखी रहीं।

panels.shot: wide establishing shot of the filled Great Bath at dusk
panels.action: At dusk, the tank now brims with still water reflecting the darkening sky; the Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer sits quietly on the steps, feet resting just above the surface.

dialogue.text: By evening the basin held a silent sheet of water, mirroring citadel walls, evening stars, and the tired faces of those who had laid every hidden joint.

i18n.hi: शाम तक कुंड में एक शांत जल–चादर ठहर गई, दुर्ग की दीवारों, शाम के सितारों और उन सबके थके चेहरों को टटोलती जिन्होंने हर छुपा जोड़ लगाया था।

panels.shot: medium wide of diverse townsfolk gathered around the pool
panels.action: Men, women, and children of Mohenjo-daro stand and sit along the surrounding rooms and steps, some touching the water, others simply watching its surface in companionable silence.

dialogue.text: People climbed the citadel to see. Some trailed their fingers along the surface, some only watched. Whatever its purpose, the pool had become a place where many eyes met the same water.

i18n.hi: लोग दुर्ग पर चढ़कर देखने आए। कोई उंगलियाँ पानी पर फेरता, कोई दूर से ही निहारता रहा। मकसद चाहे जो हो, यह कुण्ड वह जगह बन गया जहाँ कई आँखें एक ही पानी से मिलीं।

panels.shot: intimate medium shot of the engineer among citizens
panels.action: The Mohenjo-daro Hydraulic Engineer stands unobtrusively among potters, traders, and children on the steps, their shared reflections wavering together on the water below.

dialogue.speaker: mohenjo_daro_engineers
dialogue.text: Streets carry feet, drains carry waste. This water carries a piece of us all.

i18n.hi: गलियाँ पाँवों को ढोती हैं, नालियाँ मैल को। यह पानी हम सबका थोड़ा–थोड़ा हिस्सा ढोता है।

panels.shot: time-lapse style wide showing gradual decay of the structure
panels.action: In a composite image, plaster peels, bricks crumble, and windblown dust gathers in the emptied tank as centuries pass, the surrounding city slowly fading from view.

dialogue.text: Centuries later, the city emptied. Roofs fell, drains clogged with silt, salts rose from the ground, and the great tank slowly cracked under the same earth it once had held back.

i18n.hi: सदियों बाद शहर खाली हुआ। छतें ढहीं, नालियाँ गारे से भरीं, ज़मीन से नमक ऊपर चढ़ा, और विशाल टंकी धीरे–धीरे उसी मिट्टी के दबाव से चिरने लगी जिसे कभी उसने रोके रखा था।

panels.shot: archaeological wide shot mirroring p13 but in modern ruin
panels.action: The same basin now lies exposed as a brick ruin under a harsh sun, its emptied steps descending into shadow while distant figures of modern excavators study and measure.

dialogue.text: In our time, archaeologists cleared the dust and salts, tracing inlet and drain, gypsum and bitumen, reading in brick and plaster what no Harappan text has explained.

i18n.hi: हमारे समय में पुरातत्वविदों ने धूल और नमक हटाए, पानी की नाली और निकास को पहचाना, जिप्सम और राल की परतें पढ़ीं, ईंट और पलस्तर में वह कहानी देखी जो किसी हड़प्पा लिखत ने नहीं बताई।

panels.shot: contemplative wide of the Great Bath today with protective barriers
panels.action: The Great Bath stands partially scaffolded with protective barriers, the empty tank central, as the sun sets and tourists walk quietly along its edges.

dialogue.text: We cannot say with certainty how they used this pool, only that they built it with care on their highest ground, a shared space of water that still holds the shape of a city’s togetherness.

i18n.hi: हम पक्के तौर पर नहीं कह सकते कि उन्होंने इस कुंड का उपयोग कैसे किया, बस इतना जानते हैं कि इसे उन्होंने सबसे ऊँची ज़मीन पर बहुत सहेज कर बनाया—पानी की साझा जगह, जो आज भी शहर की एकजुटता की आकृति सँजोए है।

title_i18n.en: The Pool at the Heart of the City

subtitle_i18n.en: How a City of Brick and Dust Gathered Around a Quiet Pool
subtitle_i18n.hi: कैसे ईंटों–धूल का शहर एक शांत सरोवर के चारों ओर बसा
